title: Roman Numeral Converter
seoDescription: Free online Roman numeral converter. Convert numbers to Roman numerals (I, V, X, L, C, D, M) and back. Perfect for students, history, and education.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Roman Numeral Converter
step1Desc: Select Number→Roman to convert 2024 to MMXXIV, or Roman→Number to decode XIV to 14.
step2Desc: Type your number (1-3999) or Roman numeral (I to MMMCMXCIX).
step3Desc: The conversion appears instantly. Click to copy the result.
faq1Q: What is the highest Roman numeral?
faq1A: This converter supports up to 3999 (MMMCMXCIX). Romans rarely used numbers above this.
faq2A: Yes, both uppercase (XIV) and lowercase (xiv) are accepted for decoding.
faq3Q: Why no zero in Roman numerals?
faq3A: Romans had no symbol for zero. The concept was introduced later through Arabic numerals.
